problem: ENG BAFFLING CRACKED, R/H SIDE, ABOVE #1 CYLINDER.
action: CLEANED UP EDGES & INSTALLED.
REMOVED & REPLACED EXHAUST STACK CYL #1.
REMOVED & REPLACED STACK.

problem: WHILE TAXIING, L/H BRAKE PEDAL WENT TO FLOOR & BRAKE STOPPED WORKING. ON POST FLIGHT, FOUND L/H BRAKE CALIPER WAS LOOSE.
action: INSPECTED, FOUND NO DEFECTS W/ L/H BRAKE CALIPER. WAS ABLE TO DUPLICATE L/H MASTER CYL FAILURE ONCE.

problem: #1 CYLINDER ON R/H ENGINE IS CRACKED.
action: OPS & LEAK CK GOOD.

problem: #1 CYLINDER ON R/H ENGINE IS CRACKED.
action: REMOVED CYLINDER ASSY. REPLACED W/ NEW CYLINDER ASSY IAW LYCOMING OVERHAUL MANUAL. SERVICED ENGINE W/ MINERAL OIL (OLD CYL WILL BE SENT IN FOR WARRANTY).

problem: R/H ENGINE RUNNING ROUGH. DURING RUN UP ENGINE WAS VIOLENTLY SHAKING. RAN FOULED PLUG & COULD NOT GET ENGINE RPM ABOVE 2230.
action: CONFIRMED DISCREPANCY. INSPECTED R/H ENGINE & FOUND #3 CYL CRACKED. REMOVED UPPER SPARK PLUG ON CYLINDERS.
INSTALLED NEW #1 CYL IAW LYCOMING OVERHAUL MANUAL.
LEAK & OPS CK GOOD.
SEE W/O #1162266 FOR ENGINE REPLACEMENT.
REMOVED #2, 3, 4 CYLINDERS & BEGAN REPLACING W/ NEW CYLINDERS IAW LYCOMING OVERHAUL MANUAL. TORQUED CYLINDER BASE NUTS. BEGAN REASSEMBLY.

FINISHED REASSEMBLY OF CYLINDERS 2, 3, 4. DRY TAPPET CLEARANCE CK GOOD AFTER REPLACING #4 EXHAUST PUSH ROD W/ LONGER PUSH ROD, FOR CLEARANCE. TURNED IN P/N 15F19957-29 TO PARTS AS SERVICEABLE. SERVICED ENG W/ MINERAL OIL. RAN UP A/C, OPS & LEAK CK GOOD.
MAINTENANCE FLIGHT REQUIRED - SEE W/O #1163378.

problem: R/H ENG #3 CYL CRACKED BY LWR SPARK PLUG.
action: REMOVED EXHAUST & STARTED REMOVAL OF BAFFLES, O/B BAFFLES REMOVED.

problem: R/H ENG #3 CYL CRACKED BY LWR SPARK PLUG.
action: REMOVED CYL #2, 3, 4; REPLACED W/ NEW CYLINDERS. BEGAN INSTALLATION OF BAFFLES, INTAKES & MAINFOLD PRESSURE ON L/H SIDE OF ENGINE. DRY TAPPET CLEARANCE CK ON CYL 2 & 4 CK GOOD. INSTALLED ROCKER COVERS W/ NEW GASKETS & NEW INTAKE GASKETS.

problem: R/H ENG #3 CYL CRACKED BY LWR SPARK PLUG.
action: FINISHED INSTALLATION. INSTALLED NEW ROCKER & PUSH ROD ON CYL #3. DRY TAPPET CLEARANCE CK GOOD. INSTALLED NEW SILICONE GASKET & ROCKER COVER. FINISHED INSTALLING BAFFLING, INTAKES & EXHAUST. RAN UP A/C, OPS & LEAK CK GOOD.

problem: R/H ENG #3 CYL CRACKED BY LWR SPARK PLUG.
action: CYLINDER CHANGE DONE IAW LYCOMING OVERHAUL MANUAL. MAINTENANCE FLIGHT REQUIRED - SEE W/O #1163514.
REMOVED CYLINDERS. REPLACED W/ NEW CYLINDERS, RINGS, PISTONS. TORQUED CYL BASE NUTS. CLEANED & BLED PLUNGERS & INSTALLED. STARTED REASSEMBLY OF PUSH ROD HOUSINGS, PUSH RODS & ROCKERS.

ASSEMBLED PUSH RODS & ROCKERS. EXCHANGED #1 EXHAUST PUSH ROD FOR CLEARANCE. DRY TAPPET CLEARANCE CK GOOD. INSTALLED ROCKER COVERS W/ NEW SILICONE GASKETS. REINSTALLED BAFFLING, INTAKE & EXHAUST. SERVICED ENGINE W/ MINERAL OIL. OPS & LEAK CK GOOD.
MAINTENANCE FLIGHT REQUIRED - SEE W/O #1164126.

problem: #3 CYL, R/H ENGINE, CRACKED. ALL CYLINDERS ARE AE & NEED TO BE REPLACED.
action: SERVICED ENGINE W/ MINERAL OIL. BEGAN REASSEMBLING BAFFLES.

problem: R/H ENG #3 CYL CRACKED - 2, 3 & 4 ARE "AE" & NEEDED TO BE CHANGED.
action: DRAINED OIL. REMOVED BAFFLE. DISCONNECTED PROP GOV CONTROL CABLE. DISCONNECT PROP GOV OIL LINE. REMOVED EXHAUST, REMOVED INTAKES 2, 3 & 4. REMOVED PLUGS & DISPLACED ELECTRICAL WIRES.

problem: R/H ENG #3 CYL CRACKED - 2, 3 & 4 ARE "AE" & NEEDED TO BE CHANGED.
action: REPLACED #2, 3, 4 PISTONS, RINGS & CYLINDERS. TORQUED TO CASE. REASSEMBLED GOV CABLE, GOV OIL LINE & ENGINE & WIRING. SERVICED W/ MINERAL OIL.
UPON FURTHER INSP, FOUND MARKING ON BAFFLE TO BE A SCRATCH.

problem: LH eng baffle forward of #2 cylinder cracked
action: Fabricated and installed doubler out of 0.040 5052-H32 and riveted IAW AC43.13 1B Chap 5-57

problem: L/H engine exhaust stack on #2 cylinder cracked.
action: Removed L/H engine exhaust stack on #2 cylinder and installed serviceable stack.
Installed new cylinder #2 baffling on the L/H engine.
Assisted and approved.
Fabricated and installed doubler made from .063 6061 T6 aluminum. Riveted to cylinder #4 baffling REF AC 43.13-1B Section 4 Fig. 4-6.
Replaced left rear cylinder # 4 baffling with new.

problem: Baffling aft of cylinder #3 cracked near fuel flow transducer.
action: Approved
Fabricated and installed doubler patch made from .035 thick 6061 to cylinder # 3 baffling. REF AC 43.13-1B Sec.4 Fig. 4-6.
Reinstalled cylinder #3 baffling.
Approved

problem: mag test #3 cylinder failure rpm drop of 500rpm tried to troubleshoot did not fix the problem.
action: ran a/c could not duplicate discrepancy, mag checks good. no defects noted.
